name: codex-realtime-voice-agent
description: SPA voice agent: browser ↔ Node server ↔ OpenAI Realtime API + Codex bridge. WebSocket audio + JSON control.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
